name: CNC Precision Machining
shortDescription: High-precision CNC turning and milling of brass components to tight tolerances for industrial applications.
description: Our state-of-the-art CNC precision machining services utilize 24 turning centres and 8 machining centres to produce brass components with tolerances as tight as ±0.01mm. From prototype to mass production, we handle complex geometries, multi-axis operations, and high-volume runs with consistent quality and dimensional accuracy.
features: 24 CNC turning centres with live tooling

name: Hot Forging
shortDescription: High-strength brass forging for valves, fittings, and complex shapes requiring superior mechanical properties.
description: Our hot forging facility features 6 forging presses ranging from 100 to 500 tonnes, capable of producing complex brass shapes with enhanced grain structure and mechanical strength. Hot-forged brass components offer superior pressure resistance, making them ideal for valves, fittings, and safety-critical applications.

name: Quality Testing & Inspection
shortDescription: Comprehensive metallurgical testing and dimensional inspection ensuring every component meets international standards.
description: Our NABL-calibrated quality laboratory conducts rigorous incoming material analysis, in-process dimensional checks, and final product inspection. Equipped with spectrometers, CMM machines, hardness testers, and pressure test benches, we ensure every component meets or exceeds specified international standards.
features: Pressure and leak testing up to 50 bar

name: Custom Manufacturing
shortDescription: End-to-end custom brass component development from design consultation to finished product delivery.
description: We offer comprehensive custom manufacturing services for brass components tailored to your exact specifications. From initial design consultation and material selection through prototyping, tooling development, and full-scale production, our engineering team works closely with you to deliver precision parts that meet your unique requirements.

name: Surface Finishing
shortDescription: Professional plating and finishing services including nickel, chrome, tin, and powder coating for brass components.
description: Our in-house surface finishing line provides a range of plating and coating options to enhance corrosion resistance, conductivity, appearance, and wear properties of brass components. From decorative chrome plating to functional nickel and tin finishes, we deliver consistent, high-quality surface treatments.
features: Polishing and buffing to mirror finish

name: Packaging & Logistics
shortDescription: Export-grade packaging and global logistics management with door-to-door delivery across 45+ countries.
description: We handle complete packaging and logistics for international shipments with expertise in export documentation, customs compliance, and freight management. Our export-standard packaging ensures components arrive in perfect condition, whether shipping a sample box or a full container load to any of the 45+ countries we serve.
